form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Addington over 295m in 17.35 last start, beating Opawa Izzy. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Addington over 295m in 17.35 last start, beating Opawa Izzy. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Finished third (21.27) at Cambridge Raceway last time making it three placings in a row. Drawn close to the inside. Definite contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third (21.27) at Cambridge Raceway last time making it three placings in a row. Drawn close to the inside. Definite contender.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.34) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 9 length seventh. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.34) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 9 length seventh. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.9 lengths over 375m at Manawatu in a handy (21.45), beating Mojito Dreams. Has clocked a strong 17.68 Best Time here at the trip. Has ability and among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 0.9 lengths second at Manawatu but did record a slick 21.51 over the 375m trip. Can continue the solid form.

form.formComment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing seventh in 17.32 over 295m at Addington. Pay to follow up.

formComments.comment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing seventh in 17.32 over 295m at Addington. Pay to follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Squeezed up early on and lost ground.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by a nose in a Class 3 last start at this track, recording a useful 17.60 over the 305m journey. Can keep things rolling.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 375m at Manawatu. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 375m at Manawatu. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.
